For the player, see Force (Filipino player).

Force Staff is an item purchasable at the Base Shop, under Magical.

Force Staff
Allows you to manipulate others, for good or evil.
Magical
Cost 2200 (950)
Sell Value 1100
Active Force
Bonus ? +10 Intelligence
+175 Health
Shareable 0
Disassemble 0
Usage Alert ? 0
Recipe

Additional Information

[edit]
  • This item is shown as a Team Item in the shop window when purchased by an ally.
  • The item's attributes grant the following additional stats:
    • 120 mana, 0.5 mana regeneration and 1% flat base magic resistance.
    • 10 main attack damage to heroes.
    • 4.5 main attack damage to universal heroes.

Ability

[edit]

Force

[edit]
Force
▶️
Ability
Unit
Affects
Allies / Enemies
Pushes the target unit in the direction they are facing.
Cast Animation: 0 + 0
Cast Range:  550
Push Distance: 600
Push Duration: 0.5
Has a higher cast range when cast on an enemy.
Cast Animation: 0 + 0
Cast Range:  850
Roshan cannot be moved. Attempting to do so wastes the mana and cooldown.
19
150
  • Details
  • Interactions
  • Status Effects
  • Show All
Cooldown Sharing
The items listed above share their cooldowns;
Casting one of them puts them all on cooldown.
  • Cast behaviors:
    • ↓↓ Double-tapping automatically target self.
    • Can be cast on Homing Missile.
    • Cannot be cast on other Ward-type units.
  • modifier_item_forcestaff_active
    • Forcefully Moves the target at a speed of 1200.
    • Does not disable the target, they can still attack, cast abilities and items, and turn during it.
      • Does not interrupt channeling abilities of the affected target.
    • The direction is determined upon cast, it does not adapt if the target should turn while being moved.
    • Can move the target over impassable terrain.
    • Destroys trees within a 100 radius around the target.
Interactions: Debuff Immunity
Cannot be cast on debuff immune enemies, but can be cast on debuff immune allies.
Interactions: Leash Sources
Cannot be cast on leashed units. However, if reflected, ignores leash.
  • Can be cast on, but does not move units affected by the following abilities:
    • Flaming Lasso
    • Black Hole
    • Chronosphere
    • Duel
  • Cannot push units through the following temporary fences:
    • Kinetic Field
    • Arena of Blood
modifier_item_forcestaff_active
Force: Being pushed by Force Staff.
modifier_item_forcestaff_active
Force: Being pushed by Force Staff.

Recommended Heroes

[edit]

Heroes that require a mobility item will pick up a Force Staff, often in addition to a Blink Dagger.

  • Ancient Apparition
  • Batrider
  • Clockwerk
  • Earth Spirit
  • Invoker
  • Jakiro
  • Magnus
  • Nyx Assassin
  • Pudge
  • Rubick
  • Winter Wyvern
  • Vengeful Spirit

It may also be purchased by heroes intending to build a Hurricane Pike.

  • Drow Ranger
  • Enchantress
  • Luna
  • Outworld Destroyer
  • Silencer
  • Sniper

Trivia

[edit]
  • Crystal Maiden's cosmetic item, Force Staff, is based on Force Staff and shares its name.

Description
7.36a
(2024-05-26)
  • Force and similar abilities/items can no longer be used on leashed targets
7.32e
(2023-03-07)
  • Increased Force mana cost from 100 to 150.
7.32
(2022-08-24)
  • Increased health bonus from 150 to 175.
  • Reduced Force cooldown from 20 to 19.
